name: Irish Potato Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cook potatoes and mash them.
3. Combine the mashed potatoes with butter, milk, and salt. Blend until fluffy.
4. Add flour and baking powder, stirring until smooth.
5. Spread the mixture on an ungreased cookie sheet in a 10-inch circle about 1/2 inch thick.
6. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool slightly before cutting into wedges.
